scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run verify:docs && bash tools/scripts/verify.sh
scripts.docs:graph: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs graph
scripts.docs:graph:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs graph validate --skip-orphan-warnings --skip-reciprocal-warnings
scripts.docs:relationships:normalize: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs relationships normalize
scripts.docs:relationships:write: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs relationships normalize --write
scripts.docs:adr:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs adr validate
scripts.docs:adr:validate:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs adr validate --strict-index --fail-on-warnings
scripts.docs:glossary:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs glossary validate
scripts.docs:glossary:validate:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs glossary validate --fail-on-warnings --require-quickref-coverage
scripts.docs:verify: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs verify
scripts.docs:verify:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs verify --strict
scripts.docs:directory:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs directory validate
scripts.docs:directory:validate:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs directory validate --strict --fail-on-warnings
scripts.docs:directory:repair: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs directory repair
scripts.docs:directory:repair:write: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs directory repair --write
scripts.docs:graph:repair: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs graph repair
scripts.docs:graph:repair:write: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs graph repair --write
scripts.docs:readiness: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs readiness --report-path .artifacts/docs/readiness-report.json
scripts.docs:readiness:json: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs readiness --json --report-path .artifacts/docs/readiness-report.json
scripts.docs:changeplans:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs changeplans validate
scripts.docs:changeplans:validate:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs changeplans validate --strict-index --strict-placement --fail-on-warnings
scripts.docs:work-packets:validate: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs work-packets validate
scripts.docs:work-packets:validate:strict: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs work-packets validate --strict-index --strict-placement --fail-on-warnings
scripts.docs:glossary:repair: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs glossary repair
scripts.docs:glossary:repair:write: bun run foundry:build && node packages/cli/bin/run.js docs glossary repair --write
